violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings on wall ledge in kitchen ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
(Serving Line unit ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed cracked glass. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
Observed a hose(dispensing mop cleaning chemical) attached to hand sink. PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Facility is lacking a 3 bay sink to wash and sanitize utensils and equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
Milk cooler gaskets located in the kitchen area were not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The floor tiles near the refrigeration units are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

The floors along the perimeter of the kitchen have an accumulation of dry rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
Milk Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The floor tiles around the 2 door reach-in unit are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
Behind radiators inspector observed an accumulation of old mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in cabinets and on wall panels in the kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The paper towel dispenser in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
